# GIGO UI

> A Svelte 5 component library of intentionally terrible UI patterns. Every component is production-quality code implementing the worst UX ideas imaginable.

Built with Svelte 5 runes ($state, $derived, $effect, $bindable), TypeScript 5, and Tailwind CSS 4.

## Install

```bash
pnpm add @gigo-ui/components
```

Import styles once near your app root:

```svelte
<script lang="ts">
  import '@gigo-ui/components/globals.css';
</script>
```

## Components

### BadUI Collection (14 components)
Technically functional. Emotionally devastating.

- GhostCard: Card that randomly vanishes and reappears glitched
- GravityInput: Characters fall with gravity as you type
- RotaryDial: Rotary phone dial for number input
- SliderPhone: Single slider for entering phone numbers
- CatchSubmit: Submit button that runs from your cursor
- DropdownCalc: Dropdown menus for basic arithmetic
- PasswordPeekhole: Tiny draggable circle to view password
- VolumeSlider: Deliberately confusing volume control
- ProgressDoom: Progress bar that regresses randomly
- ColorPickerWrong: Color picker that picks the wrong color
- TermsSidescroll: Terms of service in a horizontal scroller
- CookieMonster: Cookie banner from hell with dark patterns
- NotificationStorm: Toast notifications that multiply on dismiss
- CaptchaFromHell: Impossible multi-stage CAPTCHA verification

### Chaos (Destruction Overlays — 6 components)
Wrap any component. One function call and it's physically destroyed.

- GigoCompactor: Voxel crush implosion (Three.js + Rapier3D WASM)
- ShatterPane: Voronoi glass fracture (Canvas2D + physics sim)
- PixelDissolve: Per-pixel wave contagion (Canvas2D particles)
- BlackHoleSink: Gravitational singularity (Canvas2D warp + glow)
- ChaosButton: Button with random chaos effects (CSS transforms)
- ChaosForm: Form that fights back (DOM manipulation)

### Standard UI (7 components)
Normal, usable components to lull users into a false sense of security.

- Button: Standard button with variant/size props and chaos toggles
- Card: Content card with 3D tilt and optional chaos rotation
- Carousel: Image carousel with lying navigation and reverse direction
- Form: Form container with random reset, fake validation, field shuffle
- Input: Text input with random deletion, fake validation, chaos escape
- Modal: Dialog overlay that resists closing, spawns more modals
- Navigation: Nav component with wrong destinations, random reorder

## Breaker Overlay API

Each overlay lazy-loads its engine only when triggered. Zero cost until destruction begins.

| Overlay       | Methods                    | Prop          | Bundle Size           |
|---------------|----------------------------|---------------|-----------------------|
| GigoCompactor | crush() / restore()        | isGarbage     | ~180KB (Three+Rapier) |
| ShatterPane   | shatter() / restore()      | isShattered   | ~2KB                  |
| PixelDissolve | dissolve() / restore()     | isDead        | ~2KB                  |
| BlackHoleSink | consume() / restore()      | isConsumed    | ~2KB                  |

## Utility Functions

```typescript
import { cn, chaosClasses, chaosRandom, chaosPickOne, randomGarbageText } from '@gigo-ui/components';
```

- cn(...classes): Merge Tailwind classes (clsx + tailwind-merge)
- chaosClasses(level: 0-10): Generate chaos CSS classes by intensity
- chaosRandom(max): Random integer 0..max-1
- chaosPickOne(items): Random array element
- randomGarbageText(): Random garbage string (ERROR, null, 💀, etc.)

## Type Exports

All component prop interfaces are exported:

```typescript
import type { GigoButtonProps, GigoCardProps, ... } from '@gigo-ui/components';
```

## Requirements

- Svelte 5.0+
- SvelteKit 2.0+
- Tailwind CSS 4.0+
- TypeScript 5.0+
- Node.js 20+

## Links

- Docs: /docs
- GitHub: https://github.com/gigo-ui/components
- License: MIT
